data.name: Trades_EmptyHint
data.value: Add your first trade to start tracking

data.name: Register_Subtitle
data.value: Create your account to get started

data.name: Register_Success_Message
data.value: Your account has been created successfully. Welcome to TradingJournal.

data.name: Register_Error_Unexpected
data.value: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

data.name: Account_SaveError
data.value: An error occurred while saving the account.

data.name: Login_Subtitle
data.value: Log in with your username or email

data.name: Register_Feature_PerfDesc
data.value: Win rate, P&L, R:R in real time

data.name: Register_SubHeading
data.value: Fill in the fields to get started

data.name: Account_EmptyHint
data.value: Click «New account» to register the first one

data.name: Account_DeleteConfirm
data.value: Delete this account? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: Account_CentHint
data.value: MT5 reports P&L in cents. The import will divide all P&L values by 100 to convert to standard units. Enter your initial capital in the standard currency (e.g., USD), not in cents.

data.name: Account_MaxRiskHint
data.value: The Lot Calculator will warn you when the risk you enter exceeds this percentage for this account.

data.name: Journal_EmptyHint
data.value: Click «New Trade» to log your first trade

data.name: Strategy_RuleHint
data.value: Write a rule and press Add…

data.name: Strategy_ConfluencesSubtitle
data.value: Technical factors that determine trade quality (S/R, Fibonacci, MAs, etc.)

data.name: ImageViewer_HelpText
data.value: Mouse wheel: zoom · Double-click: reset · Esc: close

data.name: Journal_ImportMt5Tooltip
data.value: Import trading history from MT5 report (.xlsx)

data.name: LotCalc_Subtitle
data.value: Calculate the recommended position size based on your capital, risk %, and Stop Loss distance.

data.name: Account_DeleteTooltip
data.value: Delete account (only if it has no trades)

data.name: Analytics_Subtitle
data.value: Metrics and statistics of your trading

data.name: Analytics_NoData
data.value: No data for the selected period

data.name: Analytics_NoDataHint
data.value: Adjust filters or record trades in the journal

data.name: Playbook_Subtitle
data.value: Record your most significant trades for review and learning

data.name: Playbook_EmptyHint
data.value: Save your most significant trades to analyze them and learn from them.

data.name: Playbook_NoConfluencesHint
data.value: Select a strategy with defined confluences.

data.name: Playbook_NoImageHint
data.value: Click "Select image" to load a chart

data.name: Strategy_RaterHint
data.value: Click to rate · Click again to remove · Esc to cancel

data.name: Strategy_NoConfluencesHint
data.value: Add confluences when editing the strategy (S/R, Fibonacci, MAs, etc.)

data.name: Settings_JournalSubtitle
data.value: Configure the lists of emotional states and mistake types that appear when registering trades.

data.name: Settings_EmotionalStatesDesc
data.value: States you can select when logging a trade.

data.name: Settings_MistakeTypesDesc
data.value: Types of mistakes you can associate with a trade.

data.name: Settings_SymbolsDesc
data.value: Manage broker symbol mappings for MT5 import.

data.name: Settings_SymbolsSubtitle
data.value: Map broker symbol names (e.g. EURUSD.sc) to canonical symbols (e.g. EURUSD).
